key_models.hr.employee: Employee. Fields: name, user_id, department_id, job_id, parent_id, coach_id, work_email, work_phone, category_ids, company_id.
key_models.hr.employee.category: Employee tag/category. Fields: name, color, employee_ids.
key_models.hr.department: Department. Fields: name, manager_id, parent_id, company_id, total_employees.
key_models.hr.job: Job position. Fields: name, department_id, no_of_recruitment, no_of_employee, state, requirements, company_id.
key_models.hr.contract: Employee contract. Fields: employee_id, job_id, department_id, date_start, date_end, wage, contract_type_id, resource_calendar_id, state.
key_models.hr.attendance: Attendance record. Fields: employee_id, check_in, check_out, worked_hours, overtime_hours.
key_models.hr.leave: Time-off request. Fields: employee_id, holiday_status_id, request_date_from, request_date_to, number_of_days, state, holiday_type.
key_models.hr.leave.type: Leave type. Fields: name, color, allocation_type, validation_type, leave_validation_type, company_id.
key_models.hr.leave.allocation: Leave allocation. Fields: employee_id, holiday_status_id, number_of_days, state, accrual_plan_id.
key_models.hr.accrual.plan: Accrual plan. Fields: name, level_ids, carryover_date.
key_models.hr.expense: Expense. Fields: employee_id, product_id, total_amount, date, account_id, analytic_distribution, state, sheet_id.
key_models.hr.expense.sheet: Expense sheet. Fields: employee_id, accounting_date, state, expense_line_ids, total_amount, payment_mode.
key_models.hr.applicant: Recruitment applicant. Fields: name, partner_name, email_from, partner_phone, job_id, stage_id, refuse_reason_id, salary_proposed.
key_models.hr.recruitment.stage: Recruitment stage. Fields: name, sequence, job_ids, fold.
key_models.hr.appraisal: Performance appraisal (Enterprise). Fields: employee_id, manager_id, state, date_close, goal_ids, feedback_ids.
key_models.hr.appraisal.plan: Appraisal plan (Enterprise). Fields: duration_after_recruitment, duration_first_appraisal, duration_next_appraisal.
key_models.hr.payslip: Payslip (Enterprise). Fields: employee_id, contract_id, date_from, date_to, struct_id, state, line_ids.
key_models.hr.payslip.run: Payslip batch (Enterprise). Fields: name, date_start, date_end, state, payslip_ids.
key_models.hr.payroll.structure: Payroll structure (Enterprise). Fields: name, code, parent_id, rule_ids.
key_models.hr.salary.rule: Salary rule (Enterprise). Fields: name, code, sequence, category_id, amount_select, amount_python_compute.
key_models.resource.calendar: Working schedule. Fields: name, company_id, attendance_ids, leave_ids, tz.

crons.hr_leave.accrual_plan_cron: Accrue leave allocations based on accrual plans.

security_groups.hr.group_hr_manager: HR Manager: full HR configuration and department management

record_rules.hr_employee_rule_employee: Employees see their own record and subordinates.
record_rules.hr_expense_rule_user: Employees see own expenses; managers see all.
